name: autonomous-procurement-agent
description: AI-powered enterprise procurement automation with hybrid dual-engine parsing (regex + GPT-4o), zero-leak quote comparison, built-in F1/F2/F3 fraud detection, auto-escalation approval flows, Safety-Freeze circuit breakers, and Lemon Squeezy MoR payment integration.

1.1.0: Security hardening: manifest purged of all non-essential path permissions
Webhook now refuses to start if LS_WEBHOOK_SECRET is not set (fail-fast)
All webhook event logs sanitized — no raw quote content or keys logged
Install method changed from curl|bash to git clone + npm install
Privacy policy clarified: all parsing is local unless OpenAI Fallback is enabled
1.0.0: F1/F2/F3 fraud detection built into core parser
Auto-escalation approval flow with Safety-Freeze circuit breaker

env.name: LS_WEBHOOK_SECRET
env.description: HMAC-SHA256 secret for verifying Lemon Squeezy webhook signatures. REQUIRED in production — server refuses to start without it.

env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.description: OpenAI API key for GPT-4o LLM fallback on messy formats (plain-text emails, OCR scans). Only used when OPENAI_API_KEY is set; all parsing runs locally otherwise.

env.name: LS_PRO_VARIANT_ID
env.description: Lemon Squeezy variant ID for Pro tier (default: 999)

env.name: LS_ENT_VARIANT_ID
env.description: Lemon Squeezy variant ID for Enterprise tier (default: 2999)

env.name: PARSER_DATA_DIR
env.description: Directory for local license database and historical price baseline. Default: $HOME/.procurement-agent/data

env.name: CB_THRESHOLD
env.description: Circuit breaker failure threshold before Safety-Freeze (default: 2)

env.name: LS_STORE_ID
env.description: Lemon Squeezy store ID for API calls

env.name: LS_API_KEY
env.description: Lemon Squeezy API key for license management

env.name: OPENAI_MODEL
env.description: OpenAI model for LLM fallback (default: gpt-4o). Only used when OPENAI_API_KEY is set.

env.name: EXCHANGE_RATE_URL
env.description: Optional live FX rate API endpoint for currency normalization (default: fixed rate table)

env.name: HISTORICAL_PRICE_URL
env.description: Optional API endpoint for historical price baseline (F2 spike detection)

env.name: PROCU_ALLOWED_TIER
env.description: Override tier for local dev/testing (bypasses webhook signature check). Do not use in production.

env.name: LS_PRO_VARIANT_IDS
env.description: Comma-separated Lemon Squeezy variant IDs for Pro tier (multi-price-point support)

env.name: LS_ENTERPRISE_VARIANT_IDS
env.description: Comma-separated Lemon Squeezy variant IDs for Enterprise tier

env.name: LS_TEAM_VARIANT_IDS
env.description: Comma-separated Lemon Squeezy variant IDs for Team/Seat-based tier

env.name: LS_ENTERPRISE_PRICE_ID
env.description: Lemon Squeezy price ID for Enterprise subscription (used in API calls)

env.name: PROCU_WEBHOOK_URL
env.description: Public webhook receiver URL (used in health-check endpoint, default: http://localhost:3002)

dualEngine.engine1: regex pipeline (JSON → HTML → CSV → plain text)
dualEngine.engine2: GPT-4o LLM semantic fallback (only when OPENAI_API_KEY is set)
dualEngine.threshold: auto-trigger when confidence < 0.5 or anomaly detected

riskEngine.F1: unit_price × quantity ≠ line_total → HIGH severity, blocks auto-comparison
riskEngine.F2: current_price > historical_avg × 1.20 → CRITICAL severity, red flag
riskEngine.F3: same vendor + same total within 7 days → MEDIUM severity, duplicate alert

currencyNormalizer.note: Fixed rate table. Production: use live FX feed for accuracy.

enterprise.taxHandling: MoR — Lemon Squeezy handles global VAT/Sales Tax
